title: Update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v2.12.2
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|
| [golangci/golangci-lint](https://redirect.github.com/golangci/golangci-lint) | patch | `2.12.1` → `2.12.2` |

<details>

### [`v2.12.2`](https://redirect.github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/blob/HEAD/CHANGELOG.md#v2122)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/compare/v2.12.1...v2.12.2)

*Released on 2026-05-06*

1. Linters bug fixes

   - `gomodguard_v2`: from 2.1.0 to 2.1.3
   - `iface`: from 1.4.1 to 1.4.2

</details>
